assignments.title: ABC280A Pawn on a Grid
assignments.reason: 循环嵌套：双重循环遍历H行W列网格，统计 '#' 个数

assignments.title: ABC280B Inverse Prefix Sum
assignments.reason: 前缀和逆推：A_i = S_i - S_{i-1}，还原原始序列

assignments.title: ABC280C Extra Character
assignments.reason: 字符串查找：逐位比较 S 与 T 找第一个差异位置即插入点

assignments.title: ABC280D Factorial and Multiple
assignments.reason: 质因数分解：对 K 分解质因数，找使 N! 覆盖每个质因子幂次的最小 N

assignments.title: ABC280E Critical Hit
assignments.reason: 期望DP逆推：dp[i]=期望从血量 i 打到 ≤0 的次数，两项转移

assignments.title: ABC280F Pay or Receive
assignments.reason: Tarjan SCC缩点：在有向图中检测正权环（可无限增益），SCC判断可达性

assignments.title: ABC280G Do Use Hexagon Grid 2
assignments.reason: 计数DP：六边形网格选点使两两距离 ≤D 的方案数，坐标系转换+DP

assignments.title: ABC281A Count Down
assignments.reason: for 循环：从 N 倒序到 0 逐行输出

assignments.title: ABC281B Sandwich Number
assignments.reason: 字符串遍历统计：验证格式 [大写字母][100000-999999][大写字母]

assignments.title: ABC281C Circular Playlist
assignments.reason: 二分查找：前缀和数组+对总时长取模后，lower_bound 找当前歌曲

assignments.title: ABC281D Max Multiple
assignments.reason: 0-1背包：选恰好 K 项，使和是 D 的倍数且最大，状态 (个数, 和 mod D)

assignments.title: ABC281E Least Elements
assignments.reason: 优先队列：滑动窗口维护前 K 小之和，进出窗口时用 max-heap 和 min-heap

assignments.title: ABC281F Xor Minimization
assignments.reason: 字典树：按位贪心选 x 使所有 a_i XOR x 的最大值最小，Trie引导决策

assignments.title: ABC281G Farthest City
assignments.reason: 计数DP：统计顶点1到顶点N距离最大的连通图数量，逐层计数

assignments.title: ABC282A Generalized ABC
assignments.reason: for 循环：输出 'A'+'B'+...共前 K 个大写字母拼接

assignments.title: ABC282C String Delimiter
assignments.reason: 过程模拟：遍历字符串，跟踪引号内外状态，替换非引号内的逗号

assignments.title: ABC282D Make Bipartite 2
assignments.reason: 连通块涂色：DFS二着色判断二分图，统计可新增边数 = 同色/跨分量对数

assignments.title: ABC282E Choose Two and Eat One
assignments.reason: Kruskal最小生成树：以 x^y+y^x 为边权建完全图，MST确定最优合并顺序

assignments.title: ABC282F Union of Two Sets
assignments.reason: ST表稀疏表：预处理区间合并信息，O(1) 回答任意 [L,R] 的覆盖分解

assignments.title: ABC282G Similar Permutation
assignments.reason: 计数DP：统计相似度恰好为 K 的排列对数，逐位分析递增/递减符号

assignments.title: ABC283A Power
assignments.reason: for 循环：连乘 A 共 B 次，A,B ≤9 直接暴力计算

assignments.title: ABC283B First Query Problem
assignments.reason: 一维数组：支持单点修改和单点查询的基础数组操作

assignments.title: ABC283C Cash Register
assignments.reason: BFS最短路：对数字 S 进行 ×10+d 或 ×100 操作，最少按键次数

assignments.title: ABC283D Scope
assignments.reason: 栈：括号作用域内字母不能重复出现，用栈维护当前作用域已用字母集合

assignments.title: ABC283E Don't Isolate Elements
assignments.reason: 拓扑排序：将行翻转约束建成有向图，检测 2-SAT/拓扑可行性

assignments.title: ABC283F Permutation Distance
assignments.reason: CDQ分治：求 min(|Pi-Pj|+|i-j|) 转化为二维平面最近对，分治合并

assignments.title: ABC283G Partial Xor Enumeration
assignments.reason: 异或线性基：在线性基中枚举第 L~R 小的异或可达值

assignments.title: ABC284A Sequence of Strings
assignments.reason: string数组：读入 N 个 string，逆序打印，基础 string 数组用法

assignments.title: ABC284B Multi Test Cases
assignments.reason: 循环应用：T 组测试，每组统计 N 个数中奇数的个数

assignments.title: ABC284C Count Connected Components
assignments.reason: 连通块计数：DFS/BFS 遍历无向图，统计连通分量数
